text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Vision Matters: Simple Visual Perturbations Can Boost Multimodal Math Reasoning" is confirmed real — it was the original v1 of arXiv:2506.09736, with exactly the 7 cited authors. The automated checkers found a mismatch because the paper was later revised (v2, September 2025) under a new title with 9 authors, but the cited reference accurately describes the original version.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/html/2506.09736v1
